sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60183" key="krou/nisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρούν-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n60183.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gush, stream,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
